title: eremostachys schugnanica
intro: Eremostachys schugnanica, also known as Schugnan wormwood, is a plant species native to the Pamir Mountains in Central Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Eremostachys schugnanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, and its essential oil can also be extracted for topical applications.
